snippets.description: Эталонный pint.json: declare_strict_types, date_time_immutable, final_class, fully_qualified_strict_types, global_namespace_import, mb_str_functions, ordered_class_elements, strict_comparison, protected_to_private
Эталонный phpstan.neon: larastan, level max, paths [app], inferPrivatePropertyTypeFromConstructor
Эталонный rector.php: LaravelSetProvider, TYPE_DECLARATION + Laravel-сеты, withPreparedSets (deadCode/codeQuality/typeDeclarations/privatization/earlyReturn)
Composer-скрипты QA: lint, lint:check, analyse, refactor, qa-конвейер rector → pint → phpstan → tests
